slides.heading: Abazingeli-Baqokeleli naBalusi eMzantsi Afrika
slides.lead: Dibana namaSan namaKhoikhoi - abantu bokuqala ababehlala eMzantsi Afrika - uze ufumanise ukuba ukugcina izilwanyana kwakutshintsha njani indlela abantu ababephila ngayo.

image.alt: Umhlaba owomileyo waseMzantsi Afrika onenduli enamatye, inyamakazi, kunye nelanga.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='258' cy='46' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 118 L60 96 L110 114 L168 86 L232 110 L320 92 L320 118 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M40 96 L70 60 L100 96 Z' fill='#9a7b53'/><g fill='#5c4327'><rect x='150' y='120' width='4' height='16'/><rect x='170' y='120' width='4' height='16'/><path d='M146 108 q12 -10 30 0 l0 14 -30 0 Z'/><path d='M146 108 l-8 -8 4 -1 6 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Wamkela abafundi kwibali labantu bokuqala eMzantsi Afrika. Chaza amaqela amabini amakhulu abaza kudibana nawo: amaSan, ababengabazingeli-baqokeleli, kunye namaKhoikhoi, ababengabalusi. Babuze ukuba bacinga ukuba igama elithi 'umzingeli-mqokeleli' nelithi 'umlusi' lithetha ntoni ngaphambi kokuqala. [SME] Iminyaka yale mibutho inikwa njengoqikelelo olungqongqo olulungele iBanga 5.

slides.heading: Ngoobani ababehlala apha kuqala?
slides.lead: AmaSan ngabantu bokuqala ababehlala eMzantsi Afrika, kumawaka amaninzi eminyaka eyadlulayo.

blocks.text: **AmaSan** ngabantu bokuqala eMzantsi Afrika. Babehlala apha kudala kakhulu ngaphambi kwezixeko, iifama okanye ukubhala. Eli xesha libizwa ngokuba **liXesha lamaTye lokuGqibela** (Later Stone Age), kuba abantu babesenza izixhobo zabo ngamatye, ngemithi nangamathambo.

items: AmaSan ayengakhi zixeko zisisigxina - ayefudukela kwindawo ngendawo.
Ayephila ngomhlaba ngoku**zingela** izilwanyana noku**qokelela** izityalo zasendle.
Kamva kakhulu, elinye iqela elibizwa ngokuba ngamaKhoikhoi lafika nezilwanyana zokwalusa.

slides.notes: Beka umbono wexesha elidala kakhulu. Abafundi beBanga 5 kunzima ukucinga 'kumawaka eminyaka eyadlulayo', ngoko yithelekise nokookhokho abaninzi kakhulu ababekho kudala. Yazisa igama elithi 'nomadic' (ukufudukela rhoqo) eliphinda livele kwakhona. Chaza ukuba sifunda ngaba bantu ngezinto abazishiya emva, njengezixhobo nemizobo yasematyeni.

slides.heading: AmaSan: abazingeli nabaqokeleli
slides.lead: AmaSan ayefumana yonke into ayeyidinga kwindalo eyayiwangqongile.

blocks.text: AmaSan ayephila ngoku**zingela** izilwanyana zasendle ezinjenge-gemsbok nezinye iinyamakazi, nangoku**qokelela** izityalo zasendle, iingcambu, amaqunube nobusi. Ngenxa yokuba ayelandela izilwanyana namaxesha onyaka, ayefudukela kwindawo ngendawo. Sibiza le nto ngokuba yindlela yobomi ye**nomadic** (yokufuduka rhoqo).

items: **Amadoda** ngesiqhelo ayezingela.
**Abafazi** babeqokelela izityalo bemba neengcambu zokutya.
Babethatha kuphela oko bakudingayo, ukuze umhlaba ukwazi ukubuyela esiqhelweni.

image.alt: Umfanekiso womzingeli ophethe isaphetha ecaleni komfazi othwele induku yokumba nesityalo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='70' cy='44' r='12'/><rect x='63' y='58' width='14' height='46'/><rect x='60' y='104' width='7' height='30'/><rect x='73' y='104' width='7' height='30'/></g><path d='M92 40 q22 34 0 68' fill='none' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='92' y1='40' x2='92' y2='108' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='2'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='160' cy='44' r='12'/><rect x='153' y='58' width='14' height='46'/><rect x='150' y='104' width='7' height='30'/><rect x='163' y='104' width='7' height='30'/></g><line x1='178' y1='40' x2='178' y2='120' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='188' cy='70' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza umahluko phakathi kokuzingela nokuqokelela, nokuba zombini zazifuneka ukuze kusinde - ukuqokelela izityalo kwakudla ngokunika ukutya okuthembeke ngakumbi. Qaphela ukwabiwa kwemisebenzi phakathi kwamadoda nabafazi ngaphandle kokugweba ngeengcinga zanamhlanje. Qinisekisa intlonelo amaSan ayenayo kwindalo: ayesebenzisa umhlaba ngononophelo ukuze ungapheli.

slides.heading: Isaphetha netolo elinetyhefu
slides.lead: AmaSan asungula indlela ekrelekrele yokuzingela izilwanyana ezinkulu kunawo kakhulu.

blocks.text: AmaSan ayesenza **isaphetha neentolo** ezincinci. Ayefaka **ityhefu** kwiincam zeentolo. Emva kokudubula isilwanyana, ayelandela ngokuthula imikhondo yaso - ngamanye amaxesha iintsuku ezininzi - de ityhefu isenze sibuthathaka ngokwaneleyo ukuze sibanjwe. Izakhono ezilungileyo zokulandela umkhondo zazibaluleke kakhulu.

items: Ityhefu yayivela kwizityalo, kwiinyoka okanye kwiimbungu zeekakawuli (beetle grubs).
Abazingeli kwakufuneka basondele kakhulu baze badubule kanye.
Babefunda imikhondo esesantini ukuze balandele isilwanyana.

image.alt: Isaphetha nentolo, kunye nomqolo weenyawo zesilwanyana esantini.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M50 30 q40 50 0 100' fill='none' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='50' y1='30' x2='50' y2='130' stroke='#8a7050' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='42' y1='80' x2='150' y2='80' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M150 80 l-12 -6 0 12 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#9a7b53'><ellipse cx='120' cy='120' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='140' cy='128' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='162' cy='120' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='184' cy='128' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='206' cy='120' rx='5' ry='7'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Le slayidi ibonisa isakhono nolwazi lwamaSan, ingekuphela nje ukusinda. Gxininisa umonde nokuqonda okunzulu kwendalo okwakufuneka ukuze kulandelwe isilwanyana iintsuku ezininzi nokwazi ukuba zeziphi izityalo ezenza ityhefu. Phatha 'ityhefu' ngokucacileyo nangeenyaniso - yayisisixhobo sokufumana ukutya, hayi sokwenzakalisa abantu. Babuze abafundi ukuba kutheni ukudubula kanye kwakubalulekile (ukuhlala ufihlakele, ukonga iintolo).

slides.heading: Izixhobo zamaSan nezinto zemihla ngemihla
slides.lead: AmaSan ayesenza yonke into anayo koko ayekufumana emjikelezweni wawo.

blocks.heading: Iinkuni zomlilo
blocks.text: Iinkuni ezimbini ezihlikihlwa kunye ukwenza intlantsi. Umlilo wawunika ubushushu, ukukhanya nokutya okuphekiweyo.

blocks.heading: Iqokobhe leqanda lenciniba
blocks.text: Iqanda lenciniba elingenanto lalisetyenziselwa ukuthwala nokugcina amanzi, lingcwatywe ukuze ahlale epholile.

blocks.heading: Induku yokumba
blocks.text: Induku elolongiweyo esetyenziselwa ukumba iingcambu namaqhuma okutya.

blocks.heading: Kaross
blocks.text: Ingubo yesikhumba eyenziwa ngesikhumba sesilwanyana, enxitywayo ukufudumeza nokuthwala izinto.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa ezi zinto zine ukwenza ubomi bamaSan bube nokuqondakala. Bonisa ukuba yonke into yayilula kwaye inokuthwalwa, kuba amaSan ayesoloko efuduka. Iintsimbi namaqokobhe amaqanda enciniba nawo ayesetyenziselwa ukuhombisa kwaye ayenikwa njengezipho zokwakha ubuhlobo phakathi kwamaqela. Mema abafundi bacinge ukuba nezinto abanokuzithwala kuphela.

slides.heading: AmaSan ayeyabelana ngayo yonke into
slides.lead: AmaSan ayehlala kumaqela amancinci apho wonke umntu wayelingana.

blocks.text: AmaSan ayehlala kwiqela **elincinci** elimalunga nabantu abali-15 ukuya kwabangama-40, ngokuqhelekileyo ziintsapho ezimbalwa ndawonye. Ayenga**nazikhosi** kwaye akukho mntu wayesisityebi okanye ebalulekile kunomnye. Ayeyabelana **ngokutya** kwawo ancedisane. Ayekholelwa ukuba akukho mntu unokuba ngumnini womhlaba - wawusetyenziswa nguwonke-wonke.

items: Abafazi babekwazi ukwakha indlu yengca kwixesha elingaphantsi kweyure.
Abantwana babefunda ngokudlala nangokuxelisa abazali babo.
Ukwabelana kwakuthetha ukuba akukho mntu owayelala elambile ngoxa abanye benokutya.

image.alt: Indlu yengca emise okwesazile ecaleni komlilwana wenkampu.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M40 122 a54 54 0 0 1 108 0 Z' fill='#9a8a5c'/><path d='M52 122 a42 42 0 0 1 84 0' fill='none' stroke='#7a6a3c' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M70 122 a26 26 0 0 1 48 0' fill='#5c4a24'/><g><path d='M186 122 l-8 -22 16 0 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M186 122 l-14 -14 8 -4 Z' fill='#c8611f'/><path d='M186 122 l14 -14 -8 -4 Z' fill='#c8611f'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Le yindawo entle yokuthetha ngobulungisa noluntu. Thelekisa ngobunono nehlabathi lanamhlanje apho abantu benezinto zabo. Chaza ukuba ukungabi 'nazikhosi' kwakungathethi kungabikho mithetho - iqela lalisenza izigqibo kunye kwaye abadala babehlonelwa. Gcina isandi sentlonelo kwaye uphephe ukwenza ubomi bamaSan buvakale 'bulula' okanye 'bungaphucukanga'; babufanelekile kakuhle kwihlabathi labo.

slides.heading: Umzobo wasematyeni wamaSan
slides.lead: AmaSan azoba aqhweba amawaka emifanekiso ematyeni nasezindongeni zemiqolomba.

blocks.text: **Umzobo wasematyeni** uthetha imifanekiso ezotyiweyo okanye eqhwetyiweyo ematyeni. UMzantsi Afrika unomnye wemizobo yasematyeni emihle kunayo yonke ehlabathini, kwaye uninzi lwayo lwenziwa ngamaSan. Ayezoba abantu nezilwanyana ezinjengempofu (eland), esebenzisa iipeyinti ezenziwe ngemibala yendalo. Eminye imizobo e**uKhahlamba Drakensberg** ineminyaka emalunga nama-3 000 ubudala.

items: Ipeyinti yayenziwa ngezinto ezinjengelitye elibomvu nelityheli, amalahle negazi.
**Impofu** (eland), inyamakazi enkulu, yayizotywa ngaphezu kwazo naziphi na ezinye izilwanyana.
Umzobo wasematyeni usinceda sifunde indlela amaSan ayephila ngayo noko ayekukholelwa.

image.alt: Udonga lomqolomba olunemizobo ebomvu yohlobo lwamaSan yempofu nabantu ababalekayo.

slides.notes: Gxininisa ukuba umzobo wasematyeni yingxelo yokwenene eyashiywa ngamaSan ngokwawo - unxibelelwano nexesha elidlulileyo. Khankanya ukubaluleka okukhethekileyo kwempofu (eland). IPhaneli edumileyo yaseLinton (ngoku esemyuziyamu) yakhuthaza nenxalenye yekhoti yamaphawu yaseMzantsi Afrika. [SME] Ubudala obuchanekileyo bomzobo wasematyeni buyahluka ngokwendawo; iminyaka engama-3 000 ngamanani aqinisekisiweyo anikwa yiSAHO ngeDrakensberg, kodwa eminye imizobo mitsha kwaye embalwa mdala - qinisekisa imbono nomntu oyingcali (SME).

slides.heading: Kutheni amaSan ayezoba?
slides.lead: Umzobo wasematyeni wawubalulekile kwiinkolelo zamaSan, ingekuphela nje kokuhombisa.

blocks.text: Asinakuqiniseka ngokupheleleyo ukuba kutheni amaSan ayezoba, kodwa iingcali ezininzi zikholelwa ukuba imifanekiso yayiyinxalenye **yenkolo nobomi bawo bokomoya**. Abantu abakhethekileyo ababebizwa ngokuba ngamagqirha babebamba imidaniso yokunceda uluntu lwabo, kwaye eminye imizobo isenokubonisa oko babekuva nababekubona. Lo mzobo ukwasixelela ngezilwanyana nobomi awayebazi kakuhle amaSan.

items: Eminye imizobo isenokunxulunyaniswa nemidaniso yokuphilisa namaphupha.
Eminye isenokuba yenziwa ukuzisa ithamsanqa kuzingelo.
Namhlanje umzobo wasematyeni ukhuselwe njengenxalenye yelifa laseMzantsi Afrika.

slides.notes: Yenza intsingiselo yokomoya yomzobo wasematyeni ngentlonelo nangokulula. Yenza kucace kubafundi ukuba oku koko kucingwa ziingcali ezininzi, kungeyonyaniso engqinisisiweyo - ababhali-mbali basebenzisa izikhokelo ukuqikelela ngononophelo. Phepha ulwimi olothusayo malunga 'nokungxwelerha ingqondo' (trance) neBanga 5; 'imidaniso yokuphilisa' 'namaphupha' ziindlela ezithantamisayo nezichanekileyo zokungena. Gxininisa ukuba ukonakalisa umzobo wasematyeni kuchasene nomthetho kuba uwelona luntu lonke. [SME] Ingcaciso yobugqirha/ye-trance yeyona thiyori iphambili yobufundi kodwa iyaphikiswana - yigcine ibekwe njenge 'iingcali ezininzi zikholelwa'.

slides.heading: Kufika abalusi bamaKhoikhoi
slides.lead: Malunga neminyaka engama-2 000 eyadlulayo iqela elitsha lazisa izilwanyana eMzantsi Afrika.

blocks.text: **AmaKhoikhoi** angena eMzantsi Afrika evela emantla malunga **neminyaka engama-2 000 eyadlulayo**. Igama elithi *Khoikhoi* lithetha 'abantu bokwenene'. Ayengaba**lusi**, ekwabizwa ngokuba **ngabafuyi** (pastoralists), kuba ayegcina ekhathalela izilwanyana. Le yayiyindlela entsha kraca yobomi awayengazange ayibone ngaphambili amaSan.

items: Abalusi bagcina izilwanyana ezi**thanjisiweyo** (ezifuywayo) endaweni yokuzingela kuphela.
NjengamaSan, amaKhoikhoi ayefudukela efuna amadlelo (nomadic).
Ayegcina iigusha, iibhokhwe neenkomo.

image.alt: Umfanekiso womlusi ophethe induku ehamba ecaleni kweenkomo neegusha.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='122' width='240' height='38' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g fill='#5c4327'><circle cx='40' cy='52' r='11'/><rect x='34' y='64' width='12' height='40'/><rect x='31' y='104' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='43' y='104' width='6' height='24'/></g><line x1='52' y1='44' x2='52' y2='120' stroke='#8a7050' stroke-width='3'/><g fill='#8a6a44'><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='26' ry='16'/><rect x='100' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><rect x='134' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><path d='M96 90 l-8 -6 8 0 Z'/></g><g fill='#e8e2d2'><ellipse cx='190' cy='104' rx='18' ry='12'/><rect x='178' y='112' width='4' height='12'/><rect x='198' y='112' width='4' height='12'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Yazisa utshintsho olukhulu lwale yunithi: ubulusi. Chaza 'ukuthanjiswa' ngemizekelo yemihla ngemihla (inja ethanjisiweyo okanye inkomo yasefama ngokuchaseneyo nesilwanyana sasendle). Qaphela ukuba amaKhoikhoi ayesazingela eqokelela nawo, kodwa ukugcina izilwanyana yayingumahluko omtsha nobalulekileyo. [SME] Imvelaphi nomhla ochanekileyo wokufika kobulusi/kwamaKhoikhoi eMzantsi Afrika kuyaphikiswana ngabo bafukula-mbali (archaeologists); 'iminyaka engama-2 000 eyadlulayo' ilandela izixhobo zeBanga 5 zeSAHO kwaye kukwenza lula.

slides.heading: Ubomi nemihlambi yezilwanyana
slides.lead: Bonke ubomi bamaKhoikhoi babusekwe kwizilwanyana zawo.

blocks.text: AmaKhoikhoi ayefuduka nemihlambi yawo efuna ingca entsha namanzi. Izindlu zawo, ezibizwa ngokuba **zizimatjieshuise**, zazenziwe ngamacansi eengcongolo phezu kweentonga ezimbewu ukuze zikwazi ukudilizwa zithwalwe emiqolo yezilwanyana. **Iinkomo** zazixabiseke kakhulu. Abafazi babesenga izilwanyana, amadoda esazingela inyama.

items: Izindlu neembiza zazenziwa zibe lula ukuze kube lula ukuzifudusa.
Babesela ubukhulu becala **ubisi** endaweni yokubulala iinkomo zabo.
Iinkomo zaziphela kuphela ngamaxesha akhethekileyo, njengemitshato nemingcwabo.

image.alt: Indlu yamacansi eengcongolo emise okwesazile ecaleni kwenkomo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='122' width='240' height='38' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M30 122 a52 52 0 0 1 104 0 Z' fill='#cdae74'/><path d='M46 122 a36 36 0 0 1 72 0' fill='none' stroke='#a88a4c' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M64 122 a18 18 0 0 1 36 0' fill='#8a6a3c'/><line x1='30' y1='108' x2='134' y2='108' stroke='#a88a4c' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='40' y1='92' x2='124' y2='92' stroke='#a88a4c' stroke-width='1.5'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><ellipse cx='188' cy='96' rx='26' ry='16'/><rect x='168' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><rect x='202' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><path d='M164 90 l-8 -6 8 0 Z'/><path d='M162 84 l-4 -8 6 4 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ubukrelekrele obusebenzayo be-matjieshuis - ikhaya onokulipakisha ulithwale. Ingqiqo ephambili kukuba iinkomo zazigcinwa ziphila ngenxa yobisi nanjengobutyebi, ingekuphela ngenxa yenyama. Lo ngumahluko omkhulu kumaSan, awayesitya izilwanyana awayezizingela. Yazisa igama elithi 'matjieshuis' ngobunono; indlela yokulibiza imalunga ne-'matchie-hoyse'.

slides.heading: Indlela ubulusi obatshintsha ngayo uluntu
slides.lead: Ukuba nezilwanyana kwenza uluntu lwamaKhoikhoi lwahluke kuluntu lwamaSan.

items: Ayeyabelana ngayo yonke into ngokulinganayo.
Akukho zikhosi; wonke umntu wayelingana.
Akukho mntu owayengumnini womhlaba.
Ayefumana ukutya ngokuzingela nangokuqokelela.
Izilwanyana zaziye **zibe ngezomntu** othile.
Abanye abantu baba **zizityebi** abanye baba ngamahlwempu.
Izityebi zazi**balaseka** kakhulu zinamandla.
Ayefumana ukutya ubukhulu becala kwimihlambi yawo.

slides.notes: Le yintliziyo yombuzo weCAPS othi 'ubulusi batshintsha njani uluntu'. Ingqiqo ephambili: ngenxa yokuba izilwanyana zazinokuba ngezomntu, kwavela ubutyebi, kwaye kunye nobutyebi kwafika umahluko ekubalulekeni neziqalo zeenkokeli. Veza ukuba oku 'akungcono' okanye 'akubi' - yindlela nje eyahlukileyo yokuphila eyakhula ekugcineni izilwanyana. Yenza abafundi bakhombe umahluko omnye kwikholamu nganye.

slides.heading: Ukwabelana ngomhlaba omnye
slides.lead: AmaSan namaKhoikhoi ayehlala kufuphi omnye komnye, into eyayikhokelela kwiingxabano ngamanye amaxesha.

blocks.text: AmaSan namaKhoikhoi ayehlala kwiindawo ezinye. Iinkomo neegusha zamaKhoikhoi zazisitya ingca eninzi, oku kwakugxotha izilwanyana zasendle ezazizingelwa ngamaSan. Xa amaSan ayelamba, ngamanye amaxesha ayethatha izilwanyana zamaKhoikhoi ukuze atye. Oku kwakhokelela kwimilo phakathi kwala maqela mabini. Kodwa kwakukho ne**rhwebo** kunye no**buhlobo**, kwaye amanye amaSan azibandakanya namaqela amaKhoikhoi.

items: Imihlambi yayisitya ingca, ngoko izilwanyana zasendle zazishenxa.
La maqela mabini ayerhweba kwaye ayelwa omnye nomnye.
Kunye ngamanye amaxesha abizwa ngokuba **ngamaKhoisan**.

slides.notes: Nika umfanekiso olinganisiweyo: ubudlelwane babungezongxabano kuphela. Kwakukho urhwebo, ukutshatiselana kunye nentsebenziswano kunye nokulwa ngezixhobo. Chaza igama eliqukayo elithi 'Khoisan'. Le slayidi ikwabeka ngobunono imbali yakamva (ukufika kwamaDatshi ngo-1652), abafundi abaza kudibana nayo ngokweenkcukacha ezingakumbi kumabanga akamva. Gcina isandi sinenyaniso kwaye uphephe ukubiza naliphi na iqela nj 'elibi'.

slides.heading: Ibali elide kakhulu

blocks.alt: Ithaymlayini ukusuka kumaSan okuqala angabazingeli-baqokeleli ukuya kufika kwabalusi bamaKhoikhoi.

events.label: AmaSan angabazingeli-baqokeleli ahlala kuwo wonke uMzantsi Afrika
AmaSan namaKhoikhoi ayarhweba, abelane ngomhlaba kwaye ngamanye amaxesha alwe

slides.notes: Sebenzisa oku ukunceda abafundi balandelelanise ibali: abazingeli-baqokeleli kuqala, abalusi kamva. Bakhumbuze ukuba le yimihla eqikelelweyo, ingeyoyona ichanekileyo - ababhali-mbali basebenzisa 'malunga' xa bengaqinisekanga. [SME] Yonke le mihla mine iqikelelweyo kwaye yenziwe lula kwiBanga 5; qinisekisa indlela ebekwe ngayo nomntu oyingcali (SME).

slides.heading: Esikufundileyo
slides.lead: AmaSan ayezingela eqokelela esabelana ngayo yonke into; amaKhoikhoi ayegcina imihlambi, kwaye ukuba nezilwanyana kwatshintsha indlela abantu ababephila ngayo.

blocks.text: **AmaSan** ngabantu bokuqala baseMzantsi Afrika. Ayephila ngoku**zingela nokuqokelela**, efudukela kwindawo ngendawo, esabelana ngayo yonke into, kwaye asishiyela **umzobo wasematyeni** omhle. **AmaKhoikhoi** ayenga**balusi** ababegcina izilwanyana. Ngenxa yokuba izilwanyana zazinokubanjwa njengezomntu, abanye abantu baba zizityebi kunabanye - ngoko ubulusi batshintsha indlela uluntu olwalusebenza ngayo.

blocks.question: Khankanya iindlela ezimbini amaSan ayefumana ngazo ukutya kwawo.
Loluphi umahluko omnye phakathi komzingeli-mqokeleli nomlusi?
Ukugcina izilwanyana kwalutshintsha njani uluntu lwamaKhoikhoi? Nika umzekelo omnye.

slides.notes: Phinda ushwankathele iindlela ezimbini zokuphila kunye nengqiqo ephambili yotshintsho: ukuba nezilwanyana kwakhokelela kubutyebi nomahluko phakathi kwabantu. Sebenzisa le mibuzo mithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliweyo okanye ingxoxo yeklasi. Umbuzo 1 ukhangela ukukhumbula (ukuzingela, ukuqokelela), umbuzo 2 ukhangela ukuqonda iindlela ezimbini zokuphila, kwaye umbuzo 3 ujolise kwingxaki ephambili yeCAPS malunga nendlela ubulusi obatshintsha ngayo uluntu. Bakhumbuze abafundi ukuba umzobo wasematyeni yingxelo exabisekileyo ekufuneka siyikhusele.
